'''Rall Teedra''' was the head of [[Bethal]]'s [[Bethal Commerce Council|Commerce Council]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Teedra gave a statement to [[Colonial News Nets]] regarding the [[Greddleback termite/Legends|greddleback termite]] plague that threatened the planet's [[apocia]] trees.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|4|Galaxywide NewsNets}} {{1st}}
